repository.name: Deadcode_Detector
repository.description: DeadCode Detector is a Python-based static code analysis tool that helps developers identify unused code, redundant imports, duplicate logic, and maintainability issues in software projects. It provides automated code scanning, detailed analysis reports, and insights to improve code quality, optimize performance, and reduce technical debt.
